path.style: fill: var(--icon-fill, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)); opacity: var(--icon-fill-opacity, 1); stroke: var(--icon-stroke-color, currentColor); stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width: 8px;
fill: none; stroke: var(--icon-stroke-color, currentColor); stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width: 8px;

line.style: fill: none; stroke: var(--icon-stroke-color, currentColor); stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width: 8px;
